channel.title: thinkQ on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in thinkQ on Tech Tracker

item.title: LG G8x Think Q - The ultimate dual screen flagship mobile !
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-xkCq5ZMm1u8/X5LGwX04NEI/AAAAAAAAB5w/zYMBerczVQwuYod31yViVFnKcSODggzBACLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1603454653339535-0.png" alt=""> Dual screen smartphones are new not yet popular getting them cost alot of money many company’s trying to give dual screen mobile at lower cost and then LG succeed not only they launched dual screen mobiles but also launched in very good price with 855 snapdragon chipset. You heard right, snapdragon 855 in 58k price range with dual screen that’s amazing. <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-CuLSO2rklFU/X5LGvZwAShI/AAAAAAAAB5s/07RPn-9MxR8yCNsnqK8vy3XMBfw0q2MpQCLcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1603454648568889-1.png" alt=""> - LG G8x Think Q Key Features !
